Google Operations Center (GOC) Apprenticeship Program 2026: Apply Now for Fresh Graduates in India

NotesGallery Bureau | Published: 29/5/2026
Google AdSense - AMP Inline

The Google Operations Center (GOC) has officially opened applications for its Apprenticeship Program in India. This is an excellent opportunity for fresh graduates who want to gain practical industry experience, develop professional skills, and work in a dynamic environment associated with Google’s global operations.

If you’re looking to kick-start your career with hands-on training and real-world projects, the GOC Apprenticeship Program 2026 could be the perfect opportunity.

What is the GOC Apprenticeship Program?

An apprenticeship is a structured learning program that combines formal training with on-the-job experience. Through this program, apprentices gain valuable digital and professional skills while working on real business challenges.

At Google Operations Center, apprentices become part of a team dedicated to reimagining customer support and operations. The program provides an environment where learning, innovation, and career development are encouraged.

Why Join Google Operations Center?

GOC believes in creating an inclusive workplace where diversity is celebrated and every individual has the opportunity to grow professionally.

Benefits of the apprenticeship include:

  • Real-world industry experience
  • Professional skill development
  • Formal training programs
  • Exposure to global operations
  • Opportunity to work with experienced professionals
  • Strong career-building experience for fresh graduates

Eligibility Criteria

To apply for the Google Operations Center Apprenticeship Program, candidates must meet the following requirements:

Basic Eligibility

  • Must be an Indian citizen.
  • Must possess a graduate degree.
  • Should have a strong academic record.
  • Must be able to speak and write English fluently.

Candidates who meet these criteria can apply for available apprenticeship opportunities through the official portal.

Required Documents

Applicants need to keep the following documents ready before submitting their application:

1. Updated Resume

Your resume should highlight your education, skills, projects, internships, certifications, and achievements.

2. Aadhaar Card

A valid Aadhaar Card is required for identity verification.

3. Cover Letter

A well-written cover letter explaining your interest in the apprenticeship program can strengthen your application.

4. Recent Photograph

Applicants must upload a recent passport-size photograph that will be used for identity verification purposes.

Available Apprenticeship Opportunities

Google Operations Center regularly posts apprenticeship openings across different business functions.

Opportunities may be available in areas such as:

  • Project Management
  • Talent Acquisition
  • Operations
  • Digital Business Functions
  • Customer Support Operations

If no openings are currently visible, candidates are advised to keep checking the official apprenticeship portal regularly for new opportunities.

How to Apply for GOC Apprenticeship Program 2026?

Follow these simple steps:

Step 1

Visit the official apprenticeship portal:

Step 2

Review the available apprenticeship opportunities.

Step 3

Choose the role that matches your qualifications and interests.

Step 4

Prepare the required documents.

Step 5

Submit your application online.

Step 6

Wait for further communication regarding assessments or interviews.

Selection Process

The selection process may include:

  • Application Screening
  • Resume Evaluation
  • Interview Rounds
  • Final Selection

Shortlisted candidates will be contacted by the recruitment team for the next stages of the hiring process.

Who Should Apply?

This program is ideal for:

  • Fresh graduates
  • Final-year students completing graduation soon
  • Candidates seeking industry exposure
  • Individuals interested in operations and business functions
  • Job seekers looking to build professional skills

Important Links

Final Thoughts

The Google Operations Center Apprenticeship Program 2026 offers fresh graduates a valuable opportunity to gain practical experience, build professional skills, and start their careers with a globally recognized organization. Since openings may be limited and highly competitive, interested candidates should apply as soon as possible and keep checking the official portal for new opportunities.
